evidence_quotes.quote: I would like to see more control over influencers with their advertisements and promotions

paragraphs.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. I would like to see more control over influencers with their advertisements and promotions as they have great power to convince young people by selling them different products that can be very dangerous for young people and society. Prevent these acts with more restrictive and tougher measures for those who fail to comply with the rules. As these influencers are earning a lot of money and do not know what harm they may be impacting on society. It can be very dangerous because children can buy certain items not necessary and dangerous for them without knowledge, which would be lost by parents
